events.text: WallJump, if testing other floors after layout 1 make sure you switch this to 1
ColorJump, if you want to switch between colors or testing layout 4 turn this to 1

Music, if testing on floors use numbers to connect it to the layouts music. 0 = Title theme, 1 = layout 1 music, 2 = layout 2 music, 3 = layout 3 and 4 music. But if you starting from Title you shouldnt need to worry about this
Black and White, put 0 on the color you dont want and put 1 on the shade you want to be when testing (You usually shouldnt need to touch this one)

children.text: Continous Jump and Sustain For W Key
